title: 转述陈述句
prompt_en: Practice reporting statements with said and told.
prompt_zh: 练习转述陈述句：said that / told me that。
description: 掌握转述陈述句的时态回移规则。
knowledge_points: 间接引语 said that told me that 转述

title: 转述观点与想法
prompt_zh: 练习转述想法和观点：thought that / believed that。
description: 掌握转述观点的常用动词。
knowledge_points: 间接引语 thought believed 观点 转述

title: 转述疑问句
prompt_en: Practice reporting questions with asked if and wh-words.
prompt_zh: 练习转述疑问句：asked if / asked what/where。
description: 掌握转述一般疑问句和Wh-问句的语序变化。
knowledge_points: 间接引语 asked if asked where 问句转述

title: 转述指令请求
prompt_en: Practice reporting commands and requests with told to do.
prompt_zh: 练习转述指令和请求：told + to do / asked + to do。
description: 掌握转述指令的tell/ask+宾语+to do结构。
knowledge_points: 间接引语 told to do asked to do 指令

title: 时态回移
prompt_en: Practice tense backshift in reported speech.
prompt_zh: 练习间接引语的时态回移规则。
description: 掌握现在→过去、过去→过去完成的回移。
knowledge_points: 间接引语 时态回移 backshift 时态变化

title: 时间与代词变化
prompt_en: Practice time and pronoun changes in reported speech.
prompt_zh: 练习间接引语中时间和代词的变化。
knowledge_points: 间接引语 时间变化 代词变化 转述
